data.title: KB Home Stock drops due to lower Q3 earnings and reduced 2025 housing revenue forecast. Revenue $1.62B, homes delivered 3,393, net orders 2,950.
data.description: Homebuilding company KB Home (NYSE: KBH) released its third-quarter financial results following market close on Wednesday. In Q3, the company generated $1.62 billion in revenue, surpassing analyst expectations of $1.59 billion. Earnings for the quarter were reported at $1.61 per share, higher than the anticipated $1.50 per share. KB Home delivered 3,393 homes during the quarter, marking a 7% decrease from the previous year. The average selling price per home dipped slightly to $475,700, and net orders also saw a decline of 4% year-over-year, totaling 2,950. The ending backlog value stood at $1.99 billion. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mirion Tech plans $250M offering of Convertible Senior Notes due 2031; to offer to qualified institutional buyers.
data.description: In Atlanta, Mirion Technologies, Inc. revealed plans to raise $250.0 million through a private placement of Convertible Senior Notes due 2031. The offering targets qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. Additionally, Mirion will provide initial purchasers of the notes an option to acquire additional notes.

data.title: Mirion Technologies plans $350M public offering of common stock on NYSE (MIR), with existing option for $50M additional shares.
data.description: Mirion Technologies, Inc. has initiated an underwritten public offering of $350.0 million in shares of its Class A common stock. Additionally, the company plans to provide underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to an extra $50.0 million of shares at the public offering price, excluding underwriting discounts and commissions. This offering is subject to market conditions.

data.title: Simmons First National Corp (NASDAQ: SFNC) to release Q3 earnings on Oct 16, 2025, conducting live conference call.
data.description: Today, in Pine Bluff, Arkansas, Simmons First National Corporation (NASDAQ: SFNC) revealed that they will be unveiling their third quarter 2025 earnings after the market closes on Thursday, October 16, 2025. The company's management will be hosting a live conference call to discuss these financial results.

data.description: Houston-based Weatherford International plc, listed on NASDAQ as WFRD, is set to hold a conference call on October 22, 2025. The call aims to review the Company's performance in the third quarter that concluded on September 30, 2025.

data.title: Verano will release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 29, 2025; leading cannabis company.
data.description: Verano Holdings Corp., a prominent multi-state cannabis company, revealed its intention to disclose financial outcomes for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2025, prior to the market opening on October 29, 2025. The company's stocks are identified as Cboe CA: VRNO and OTCQX: VRNOF.
